meetings.title: High-level debate on the theme “Preventing and combating illicit trafficking in wildlife and other crimes that affect the environment”
High-level debate on the theme “Preventing and combating illicit trafficking in wildlife and other crimes that affect the environment”

meetings: General Assembly, Eightieth session -- Informal consultations on the modalities and political declaration of the high-level meeting of the General Assembly to commemorate the twentieth anniversary of the adoption of the Durban Declaration and Programme of Action
Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions -- Meeting (also with virtual participation)
Committee on Contributions, Eighty-sixth session -- Meeting
Committee for Programme and Coordination, Sixty-sixth substantive session -- 18th meeting

Executive Board of the United Nations Development Programme, the United Nations Population Fund and the United Nations Office for Project Services, Annual session 2026 -- 2nd plenary meeting
General Assembly -- High-level debate on the theme “Preventing and combating illicit trafficking in wildlife and other crimes that affect the environment”
Security Council -- Consultations of the whole [Closed]

Division for Special Activities, Department of Operational Support -- Secretary-General’s Annual Memorial Service to honour the United Nations personnel (civilian, military, and police) who lost their lives in the line of duty from 1 January to 31 December 2025, including fallen colleagues from the Funds and Programmes (organized by the Division for Special Activities of the Department of Operational Support)
Arab Group -- Meeting (at the ministerial level)

Permanent Mission of Brazil,Permanent Mission of Ecuador,Permanent Mission of Gabon,Permanent Mission of Germany,Permanent Mission of Kenya,Permanent Mission of Peru,United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC) -- Event entitled “Protecting People and the Planet: Innovative Approaches in Addressing Crimes that Affect the Environment”, held on the margins of the high-level debate on the theme “Preventing and combating illicit trafficking in wildlife and other crimes that affect the environment” (co-organized by the Permanent Missions of Brazil, Ecuador, Gabon, Germany, Kenya and Peru, in collaboration with the United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC))
